report.summary: Quiet cycle: HEAD unchanged at 3b2dd28. Publish queue empty. Uncommitted files grew 83→90. Deploy gap now 9 days — commit+push increasingly overdue.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: HEAD unchanged at 3b2dd28 (Apr 1 build fix) — no new commits this cycle
Last commit touched 10 pages: 9 learn guides + stablecoin-yield-tracker tool — all removing 'use client' from metadata-exporting pages
1,244 page.tsx files on disk — stable
630 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES — stable
Publish queue: empty (cleared in prior cycle, confirmed this cycle)
141 TS errors across 4 files — STABLE: structured-data.examples.ts (non-critical), plus 3 learn guides. Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true)
109 published slugs still missing page.tsx — long-standing debt, unchanged
Production build test: sandbox OOM (bus error) — environment limitation, not code regression

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 core data API routes present: prices (60s TTL, fallback ✓), trending (300s TTL), fear-greed (600s TTL), market-metrics (60s TTL), market-dominance (300s TTL, fallback ✓), defi-yields (300s cache duration)
Cache-Control + stale-while-revalidate headers configured on all 6 routes
Rate limiter coverage: 2/6 routes protected (cache-stats + health only) — prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields all unprotected. Persistent gap
Fallback data gap: defi-yields returns 500 on DefiLlama failure — still no graceful fallback. P1 persistent
Cannot verify live API responses — sandbox egress blocks degen0x.com

sections.title: DevOps
items: Deploy gap: 9 days since batch deploy Mar 25 (21aaf5b). Last commit Apr 1 (3b2dd28) committed but likely not deployed
90 uncommitted files (+7 from v4's 83): working tree drift accelerating
Vercel project: prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75 — cannot verify live deployment from sandbox
Build config stable: 8GB heap, standalone output, ignoreBuildErrors=true, concurrency=4
Time-sensitive: Ethereum Pectra upgrade ~8 days (Apr 10), US tax deadline ~13 days (Apr 15) — content exists but is undeployed

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Cycle output: 0 new commits, 0 new pages. Publish queue remains clear
Uncommitted file backlog growing: 90 files (was 83 in v4, 79 in v3) — needs commit+push
Carry-over (persistent): 109 missing page.tsx slugs, 4/6 API routes unprotected, defi-yields fallback gap
Blockers for Jefe: (1) Commit+push overdue — 90-file backlog, 9-day deploy gap widening, (2) Time-sensitive Pectra + tax deadline content not live, (3) defi-yields P1 fallback still open
